channel.title: Benjy School Notes
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Benjy School Notes

item.title: Haiku History
item.description: The haiku is a very short form of poetry that comes from Japan.

item.title: Haiku
item.description: The parting of clouds A beam of sun shining down Then the beam is gone The chill of the air The echo of my breathing Through the mossy headstones Dark rain clouds above The icy cold wind blowing Winter is still here The darkness of night The patter of night time rain A storm is coming The grass in t...

item.title: Poetry and Me
item.description: I’ve always enjoyed poetry. From fairly young I was read poems by my parents and grandparents and then read them by myself when I could read.

item.title: Sestina History
item.description: The sestina is a type of poem that is known for being very challenging to write.

item.title: Sestina Print
item.description: Sat at the bottom because of the other. Staring off through the mist into the distance.

item.title: Sestina
item.description: Words A Other B Distance C Unending D Depth E Veil F Empty A Sat at the bottom because of the other.

item.title: Sonnet History
item.description: The sonnet is one of the oldest types of poem and they have been around for hundreds of years. They originated in Sicily in the thirteenth century.

item.title: Sonnet
item.description: A white dove flies above the silent trees. She dives and swoops but scarce meets with the ground.

item.title: index
item.description: Benjy School Notes Use the sidebar to navigate subjects and files. Graph view is non-functional except for some parts of the maths folder.

The opportunity Exposition Timmy steals Jemma’s Justin Bieber body pillow and wets the bed and it is ruined Jemma very angry Family goes on holiday to USA Timmy takes the window seat Complication Jemma gets an opportunity to push her little brother into the grand canyon.
